summary: Excellent audience recording captures a tight, energetic 1987 performance with an awesome set list.
review: Fans rave about this 1987 show as a business‑like, tightly executed set that stays intense from start to finish, noting the “killer” playing and an especially energetic vibe. The FOB (audience) tape is repeatedly praised as a huge upgrade over previous releases, delivering clear, well‑balanced sound despite a slight thinness on Phil’s bass in the reviewer’s ears.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both performance and audio quality across multiple detailed 5‑star reviews; minor criticisms are limited to a single comment about Phil’s tone, resulting in an overall strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call it a huge upgrade and a great aud tape; sound is clear, well‑treated, with no noted dropouts or major flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy throughout, with concise drums & space sections that keep the momentum tight and businesslike.

band_member_comments.Phil: A few reviewers felt his bass was a bit thin on this recording.
